title: Lab Status
description: Per-lab live status block read by the website's /now page at build time. Each lab writes this at every cycle close. The website fetches both at build, renders a small status block above the existing timeline.

cycle.description: Current cycle number (HIVE) or current program-cycle (AGI).

current_focus.description: One-line description of what the lab is working on right now. Set by the Director's pre-commitment for the active cycle.

last_build_status.description: Status of the most recent build / training run. 'n/a' if the lab does not have a build/training surface in this cycle.

last_artifact.description: Lab-relative path to the most recently written artifact this cycle (cycle summary, finding, paper draft, etc).

updated_at.description: ISO timestamp when this status was last written by the lab.
